title: Senior Software Engineer - mfine Global Group - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - mfine Global Group - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Join the mfine Global Group family as a Senior Software Engineer in Gwalior. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About mfine Global Group:
mfine Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with mfine Global Group!
